title: DesignGuide
description: Machine-checkable design tokens owned by the UX Designer (UI projects). The source of truth for what implementation tokens + component code must adhere to. Grounded in a real shipped guide (partner-asset-tracker client/src/styles/theme.css + STYLE_GUIDE.md). The narrative design-guide.md explains intent; this JSON is what adherence is checked against.

font_mono.description: Secondary font family (mono / numeric / tabular), e.g. for a data-heavy stock table. Maps to --font-mono.

line_heights.description: Named line-height tokens (values as strings), e.g. body -> "1.5". Maps to --line-height-<name>.

font_weights.description: Named font-weight tokens (values as strings), e.g. medium -> "500". Maps to --font-weight-<name>.

colors.description: Color groups (brand, semantic, surface, ...) each mapping named tokens to values.
